content.stem: In a 3x3 grid, each row shows shapes getting larger and each column shows shapes changing from circle to square to triangle. What goes in the bottom right corner?
content.explanation: The bottom row should have the largest shapes (following the size pattern), and the right column should have triangles (following the shape pattern).

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student sees triangle shape but ignores size progression
Student partially applies size pattern but not completely
Student focuses on size but ignores shape pattern in columns
